acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md has a dated 0.4.0 section describing the assessment-confidence change.
The committed dist/rigor.cjs is byte-identical to a fresh build.
No source, schema, test, or policy behavior changes in the release commit.
constraints: Only bump versions and edit the changelog; do not change runtime behavior.
Do not weaken, skip, or delete tests.
Do not modify protected paths or the CI bundle in this release commit.
dist/rigor.cjs must remain byte-identical to a fresh build of the merged source.
